name: Round Island Boa
conservationEfforts: Invasive species eradicated from Round Island in the 1980s-90s. Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust captive breeding. Habitat restoration allowed native palm woodland to recover.
description: Found only on Round Island off Mauritius, this boa's jaw structure is unique — the upper jaw can move independently of the skull. Removal of invasive goats and rabbits allowed dramatic habitat recovery.
